staff.name: Maria Santos
staff.bio: Former Broadway stage manager turned community theatre evangelist. Maria founded the club in 2019 with nothing but eight kids and a pile of moving boxes.

staff.name: Devon Park
staff.bio: Classically trained pianist who believes every kid can carry a tune — they just need someone to believe in them first.

staff.name: Aisha Thompson
staff.bio: Dance teacher by day, choreographer by weekend. Her motto: 'If you can walk, you can dance. If you can talk, you can sing.'

staff.name: Bill Kowalski
staff.bio: Retired carpenter who builds our cardboard sets with the kids. His philosophy: 'A wobbly castle built by a proud kid beats a perfect one every time.'

cast.name: Zara M.
cast.funfact: Age 12 · This is her 5th show with the club. She once performed an entire scene with her costume on backwards and nobody noticed.

cast.name: Leo R.
cast.funfact: Age 10 · Joined because his sister did. Now he's the one who can't stop singing show tunes in the car.

cast.name: Mika T.
cast.funfact: Age 14 · The club's resident philosopher. Writes most of her own dialogue and is usually right that her version is better.

cast.name: Jayden K.
cast.funfact: Age 9 · Cannot physically stand still for more than 4 seconds, which is why this role was literally written for him.

cast.name: Sofia L.
cast.funfact: Age 11 · Started as a set painter last year. This is her first time on stage and she's already stealing scenes.

cast.name: Owen B.
cast.funfact: Age 13 · The tallest kid in the club. His booming voice can be heard from the parking lot. Literally.

cast.name: Priya S.
cast.funfact: Age 8 · The youngest cast member. Insisted on doing all her own stunts, which mostly involve crawling through boxes.

cast.name: Ethan W.
cast.funfact: Age 12 · Also plays trumpet in the pit band. Has been known to sprint from stage to orchestra pit mid-scene.

builders.name: Noor A.
builders.funfact: Age 14 · Keeps everyone on schedule with color-coded binders that would make a NASA engineer jealous.

builders.name: Marcus D.
builders.funfact: Age 13 · Taught himself lighting design from YouTube tutorials. His blackout timing is impeccable.

builders.name: Lily C.
builders.funfact: Age 15 · Sews, hot-glues, and bedazzles every costume. Her Queen Cardboard crown is a genuine masterpiece.

builders.name: Sam & Jordan
builders.funfact: Ages 10 & 11 · Siblings who argue about everything except how to turn a refrigerator box into a castle tower.

builders.name: Ava F.
builders.funfact: Age 12 · Creates all our sound effects from scratch. The 'crumbling castle' track has over 40 layers. She's 12.
